items.name: taskloom-kanban
items.description: Taskloom is a production-grade realtime collaborative Kanban SaaS platform built with Next.js 15, Supabase, PostgreSQL, Tailwind CSS, Zustand, and Framer Motion. items.description: A Budget Tracker is a financial management application that helps users record, monitor, and manage their income and expenses efficiently. items.name: CLEANDIGI
items.description: CleanDigi is a smart digital cleaning app designed to help users organize and optimize their devices effortlessly. It removes junk files, clears cache, manages storage, and improves device performance with a simple and user friendly interface. The app helps keep phones fast, clean, and efficient for everyday use.
